backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining all backend data types (services, vessels, gift cards, users, etc.) and canister logic including blob storage, access control, and migration support for the KD Platform.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that transforms the old actor state to the new actor state, currently passing userFavorites through unchanged.
backend/users/Users.mo: Users subsystem module providing CRUD operations (create, find, list) and state management for user records using an OrderedMap keyed by Nat ID.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting the implementation of a live NOC mini-widget on KDTrustPage with polling, animated status badges, and the files/components involved.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document summarizing each frontend source file's purpose, covering pages, hooks, styles, and configuration for the KD Platform React app.
frontend/index.html: Main HTML entry point with SEO meta tags, Open Graph/Twitter Card metadata, GA4 analytics tracking, Font Awesome CDN, and JSON-LD structured data for Blackgold Kdenterprise.
frontend/public/.htaccess: Apache configuration enabling automatic WebP image negotiation, proper MIME types, compression, and long-term cache control for optimized images.
frontend/public/bgkd-giftcard-system.htm: Standalone HTML page for the BGKD Gift Card System featuring a maritime-themed hero banner, branding assets, and a notice section for blockchain-powered gift card management.
frontend/public/image-optimization-repor: A styled HTML report page for Blackgold Kdenterprise displaying image optimization statistics, including stat cards, image lists with badges, and a tech stack section.
frontend/public/noc-mini-widget/embed-ex: A demo page showcasing the NOC Mini Widget Ultra-Enhanced Pack with interactive controls, feature descriptions, and configuration code examples.
frontend/public/noc-mini-widget/final-sn: A minimal ready-to-paste HTML snippet that embeds the NOC Mini Widget with all Ultra-Enhanced Pack features enabled via configuration script.
frontend/public/noc-mini-widget/noc-mini: Stylesheet for the NOC Mini Widget implementing glassmorphism design with collapsed/expanded states, animated pulse effects, status badges, TVL trail canvas, and neon glow animations.
Standalone HTML page that renders the NOC Mini Status Widget with collapsed and expanded states showing TVL, Omni-Mesh, AI Self-Healing, Black Hole Mode, and Predictive Failover metrics.

A self-contained JavaScript widget (v3.0.0) that renders a floating glass-card NOC status display with live TVL metrics, animated charts, and optional ultra-enhanced visual effects like radar rings and neon pulses. It reads configuration from `window.NOC_MINI_WIDGET_CONFIG` and respects the user's reduced-motion preference.
frontend/public/noc-mini-widget/README.t: Documentation for the NOC Mini Status Widget Ultra-Enhanced Pack v3.0.0, providing copy-paste HTML/JS snippets, configuration options, and descriptions of TVL gradient trails, neon pulse, and radar ring visual effects.
frontend/public/press-release.html: A standalone HTML press-release page announcing the BGKD Crypto Token launch by Blackgold Kdenterprise, including full Open Graph, Twitter Card, and GA4 tracking meta tags. It targets SEO for maritime/blockchain audiences and references a June 1, 2025 token launch date.
frontend/README.md: Brief README describing the KD Platform frontend stack: React, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Internet Identity auth, and React Query state management.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Defines the TanStack Router configuration for the entire frontend, registering all application routes (home, services, fleet, KD Platform, KD Ship education sub-routes, KD Trust, etc.) under a shared root Layout component. Acts as the application entry point for routing.
frontend/src/components/kd/AdminAddUserC: A card form component that allows admins to add new users by name and email, using the useAddUser mutation hook and displaying success or error feedback.
Renders a search input and category dropdown filter bar for the AI Hub, computing per-category tool counts from the full database and displaying a filtered/total count badge.
Displays a profile card for Hemant Kamble alongside a grid of filtered AI tool cards with category color badges, favorite toggling, and external links.
frontend/src/components/kd/NOCLiveMiniWi: A live NOC status widget that polls system metrics every 5 seconds and renders color-coded status badges for Omni-Mesh, AI Self-Healing, Black Hole Mode, and Predictive Failover.
frontend/src/components/KDTrustDashboard: A React dashboard component that displays a simulated multi-org trust-node monitoring UI with live-updating metrics (latency, CPU, trust score, uptime) and a Recharts line chart. It includes color-coded status indicators, alert subtypes, org summaries, and a remediation spinner for alerting nodes.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: The shared application shell component that renders the sticky navigation header with dropdown menus, mobile sheet navigation, Internet Identity authentication (login/logout), and an `<Outlet>` for page content. It adapts its styling based on whether the current route is a KD Ship, KD Trust, or standard maritime page.
frontend/src/components/noc/ComplianceSh: A static card displaying VARA compliance status badges including license grant, Stage 3 submission, and a $75B ARR target with key milestone dates.
frontend/src/components/noc/Institutiona: A static card showing three institutional metrics—capital pipeline ($4.8B), global market share (98%), and staking terminal PnL accuracy (97%).
frontend/src/components/noc/LiveOperatio: An interactive SVG-based canister topology dashboard that visualizes inter-canister data flows with hoverable nodes, live-simulated TX rate and cycle usage metrics, and real-time status from AI, treasury, DAO, and ZK canisters.
frontend/src/components/noc/NOCAdminSect: React component providing NOC admin controls including adding/removing users by principal ID and toggling universal launch state, with total user count display.
frontend/src/components/noc/NOCMiniWidge: React component that dynamically loads and renders the NOC mini widget by injecting its CSS/JS assets and providing the HTML structure for live metrics display including TVL, AI healing, and chart canvases.
frontend/src/components/noc/NOCStatusWid: Fixed-position NOC status widget card that displays TVL, AI self-healing, and other metrics with expand/hover behavior, using data derived from the useNOCStatusWidgetMetrics hook.
frontend/src/components/noc/UniversalLau: Card component that displays a countdown timer and status badges for an active universal launch event, pulling omni-mesh status from a query hook.
frontend/src/components/OptimizedImage.t: A React image component that serves WebP images via a `<picture>` element with automatic fallback to the original format, supporting lazy/eager loading and quality hints. Social media and token images bypass WebP conversion to remain uncompressed.
frontend/src/components/shipping/CreateS: Form component for creating a new shipment with fields for ports, vessel selection, dates, customs documentation, and dynamic cargo item management, submitting via the useCreateShipment mutation.
frontend/src/data/aiTools.ts: Static data file defining a list of AI tool categories and a large database of AI tools with name, description, URL, and category fields.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using the current Internet Identity, returning an anonymous actor when unauthenticated and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login/logout state, identity persistence, and AuthClient creation with configurable options.
frontend/src/hooks/useKDTrustFavorites.t: Manages user favorites with dual persistence: localStorage for unauthenticated users and backend canister for authenticated users, merging the two on login.
Persists and restores the user's last search term and category selection to/from localStorage.
frontend/src/hooks/useNOCLiveStatus.ts: Fetches live NOC status metrics (OmniMesh, AI self-healing, black hole mode, predictive failover) from the backend actor, polling every 5 seconds with a fallback status for unauthenticated or error states.
frontend/src/hooks/useNOCMiniWidgetLiveU: Feeds live NOC metrics from React Query data into an embedded snippet widget via `window.updateNOCWidget`, updating both on data changes and on a 5-second polling interval.
frontend/src/hooks/useNOCStatusWidgetMet: Derives and formats NOC widget metrics (TVL, AI self-healing, black hole mode, predictive failover) from backend data, falling back to simulated values when real data is unavailable.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes React Query hooks for all backend canister interactions, including queries for services, vessels, company info, tokenomics, gift cards, and mutations for form submissions.
frontend/src/hooks/useUniversalLaunchRep: Provides React Query hooks for fetching Universal Launch Report data (treasury status, OmniMesh status, cycles balance, DAO proposals) with 10-second polling intervals.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Tailwind CSS layers and defines maritime/KD-themed CSS custom properties (OKLCH colors) for light and dark modes, plus NOC dashboard keyframe animations.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that mounts the root component wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AboutPage.tsx: About page displaying company heritage text and a grid of core values (Excellence, Safety, Global Reach, Innovation) fetched via useGetCompanyInfo hook.
frontend/src/pages/CareersPage.tsx: Careers page showing employment benefits, training programs, and a contact inquiry form that submits via useSubmitCareerInquiry mutation.
frontend/src/pages/ContactPage.tsx: Contact page displaying company address, phone, and email info fetched from the backend, plus a message submission form using useSubmitContactForm.
frontend/src/pages/CryptoTokensPage.tsx: Crypto tokens page featuring a live countdown timer to a June 2025 exchange listing, tokenomics data from useGetTokenomics, and an investor inquiry form.
frontend/src/pages/FleetPage.tsx: Displays a fleet of vessels as cards with vessel details, images, capacity, and a collapsible list of active shipments per vessel. Each shipment links to its detail page.
frontend/src/pages/GiftCardSystemPage.ts: Full-featured gift card management page with Internet Identity authentication, canister/network info display, gift card creation/listing, analytics, and user profile management.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Marketing landing page showing a hero section, company metrics, and a services overview, pulling dynamic data from the company info query.
frontend/src/pages/KDDashboardPage.tsx: Authenticated dashboard for the KD Platform showing total users, token contract info, network status, and an admin user-management card; redirects unauthenticated users to a login prompt.
frontend/src/pages/KDPlatformLandingPage: Simple landing page for the KD Token Platform with a headline, description, and a button that navigates to the dashboard.
frontend/src/pages/kdship/AdminDashboard: Admin dashboard page requiring Internet Identity login, displaying summary stats (students, courses, certificates, pass rate) and tabbed management sections for courses, questions, students, and certificates.
frontend/src/pages/kdship/CertificatesPa: Certificates page that requires Internet Identity login and displays a placeholder empty state indicating no certificates have been earned yet.
frontend/src/pages/kdship/CourseBrowserP: Course catalog page displaying a static grid of four maritime courses (IMU-CET, DNS Deck, DNS Engine, STCW) with subject/topic counts and a 'View Course Details' button for each.
frontend/src/pages/kdship/CourseDetailPa: Course detail page that reads a courseId URL param and renders a placeholder card listing upcoming content sections (subjects, video lessons, study notes) pending backend integration.
frontend/src/pages/kdship/KDShipLandingP: Landing page for the KD Ship maritime education platform, featuring a hero section with navigation buttons and a feature cards grid highlighting IMU-CET, DNS, and STCW offerings.
frontend/src/pages/kdship/QuizPage.tsx: Quiz page that reads a quizId URL param and renders a placeholder card indicating quiz functionality is pending backend integration.
frontend/src/pages/kdship/StudentDashboa: Student dashboard page requiring Internet Identity login, showing overview stat cards (enrolled courses, completion rate, quiz average, certificates) and quick-action navigation cards.
frontend/src/pages/kdship/SubscriptionPa: Displays three subscription tier cards (Free, Basic, Premium) with pricing and features for a maritime learning platform. Payment integration is noted as pending for Phase 2.
frontend/src/pages/KDTrustPage.tsx: KD Trust Monitor page displaying real-time node telemetry, an AI tools hub with search/category filtering and favorites, a NOC live widget, and an optional Internet Identity login banner for syncing favorites.
frontend/src/pages/NOCPage.tsx: The Network Operations Center page requiring Internet Identity authentication, displaying AI status, treasury, DAO proposals, ZK proofs, OmniMesh, and admin controls via multiple specialized sub-components and query hooks.
frontend/src/pages/ServicesPage.tsx: Displays a grid of maritime services fetched from the backend, with icon mapping and a detail dialog, plus dedicated sections for Oil & Gas and other special service categories.
frontend/src/pages/ShipmentDetailPage.ts: Shows detailed information for a single shipment identified by route params, including route, status badge, cargo details, and a history timeline, with navigation back to the dashboard.
frontend/src/pages/ShippingDashboardPage: Lists all shipments in a filterable table with status badges and date formatting, and provides a dialog for creating new shipments via CreateShipmentForm.
frontend/src/pages/UniversalLaunchReport: An authenticated report page displaying KD Platform launch metrics including treasury status, OmniMesh status, cycles balance, and DAO proposals with formatted TVL and latency values.
frontend/src/types/noc-mini-widget.d.ts: Declares global TypeScript types for the NOC Mini Widget, extending the Window interface with configuration options and an update function for real-time status data.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom color palettes (maritime, kdship, kd themes), border radius, font families (Inter, Orbitron), and accordion keyframe animations, with tailwindcss-animate and typography plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks the overall project state at version 7, documenting existing features, pending action requests (AR-1 through AR-6+), architectural notes about Internet Identity auth, per-user Motoko favorites storage, and the NOC mini-widget implementation.
